verdicts.note: Incumbency and former county office support a proven-record direction, but the dossier does not document tenure, leadership, or enacted work sufficient for the maximal -2 score.
His sheriff background and public-safety emphasis support an enforcement lean, but the dossier gives no current enforcement mechanism warranting the maximal -2 placement.
The dossier identifies her as a challenger but provides no substantive professional or institutional profile. Lack of documented elected tenure alone is not affirmative evidence for the renewal pole.

review_notes: All 7 original scored pairs were reviewed exactly once (2 adjust, 4 upheld, 1 refuted). No omitted axis had sufficiently specific dossier evidence for a supported missing proposal.
